terms.definition: The object you call to emit messages (logging.getLogger(name)); named hierarchically so output can be filtered per component.
The severity of a message — DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL — used to filter what is emitted; the default threshold is WARNING.
A logging component that routes records to a destination such as the console (StreamHandler) or a file (FileHandler).
Defines how a log record is rendered into text, e.g. including timestamp, level name and message.
The top-level logger configured by logging.basicConfig; all named loggers propagate to it unless configured otherwise.
